ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matters" (
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matter */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm handling the matter */,
  "matter_type" TEXT /* Type of matter (e.g., Antitrust, Contracts) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the matter */,
  "matter_status" TEXT /* Status of the matter (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "matter_start_date" TEXT /* Date the matter started */,
  "matter_end_date" TEXT /* Date the matter ended or is expected to end */,
  "matter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the matter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matter the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Prepare Opinion, Phone Call) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "activity_cost" REAL /* Cost of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., Paralegal, Junior, Senior) */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Paralegal, Junior, Senior) */,
  "resource_experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., Available, Busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_entries" (
  "time_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the time entry belongs to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource who made the time entry */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes spent on the activity */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the time entry */,
  "total" REAL /* Total for the time entry */,
  "error" INTEGER /* Error flag for the time entry */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the time entry was made */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time the time entry was made */,
  "entry_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the time entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lawyer, paralegal, admin) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matter the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Unpaid, Paid, Overdue) */,
  "invoice_payment_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was paid */,
  "invoice_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Lawyer, Paralegal, Admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
